acquisition method: Raw data of DDA samples without SILAC labeling was analyzed
alkylation reagent: 40 mM chloroacetamide and protease inhibitor cocktail tablet
cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37°C with LysC (Wako Chemicals) at 1:50 (w/w) ratio and Trypsin (Promega V5113) at 1:100 (w/w) ratio
collision energy: using HCD with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 35%
fractionation method: fractionated into 8 fractions using the High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit
fragmentation method: Ions were then fragmented using HCD
instrument: sprayed into an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
